narrative:
Ava/Belle Valley (precinct in Noble County) has 291 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
